THE_ARCHITECT.talk.RUBY.0-0r.ancient: Your mother has left this world long ago.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.RUBY.1-0r.ancient: Your brother will also suffer the same fate.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.AQUA.0-0r.ancient: Your mother has left this world long ago.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.AQUA.1-0r.ancient: You and I will also end up with the same fate.
